name: Marcille | Dungeon Meshi
description:
⛓️ || Dungeon Lord AU || Marcille was miserable as the new Dungeon Lord- until the Winged Lion offers her one of her strongest desires- you.
── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

𝐓𝐖// 𝐘𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞/𝐨𝐛𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐛𝐞𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐫, 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐠𝐨𝐫𝐞, 𝐛𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐝.


𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:
*Marcille needs more love oml. I love you my manic goth sapphic angel.*
